ModernRecord schemas/aliases/cross_namespace_alias.avsc

Modern version of a record that used to live in a different namespace.
NewEnumName schemas/aliases/enum_with_alias.avsc

Enum renamed; old name as alias.
FieldAliasRecord schemas/aliases/field_aliases.avsc

Record where fields have aliases for schema evolution.
NewFixedName schemas/aliases/fixed_with_alias.avsc

Fixed renamed; old name as alias.
CanonicalRecord schemas/aliases/record_multiple_aliases.avsc

Record with many aliases from multiple renames over time.
CurrentRecord schemas/aliases/record_relative_alias.avsc

Record with a relative alias. Fully-qualified alias: com.example.aliases.LegacyRecord.
NewRecordName schemas/aliases/record_type_alias.avsc

Record renamed; old name kept as alias for schema evolution.
EvolvingSchema schemas/aliases/schema_evolution_v2.avsc

Demonstrates schema evolution: renamed field (alias), added field (default), changed namespace via record alias.

RegionCode enum.

SortDirection schemas/enums/extra_sortdirection.avsc

TokenType schemas/enums/extra_tokentype.avsc

TrainingStatus enum.
WebSocketState schemas/enums/extra_websocketstate.avsc

WebSocketState enum.

State of a feature flag.
FileFormat schemas/enums/fileformat.avsc

File formats.
Gender schemas/enums/gender.avsc

Gender options.
HttpMethod schemas/enums/httpmethod.avsc

HTTP methods.
HttpStatus schemas/enums/httpstatus.avsc

Common HTTP status codes.
IndexType schemas/enums/indextype.avsc

Database index types.
IsolationLevel schemas/enums/isolationlevel.avsc

Transaction isolation levels.
LifecycleState schemas/enums/lifecyclestate.avsc

Entity lifecycle state.
LogLevel schemas/enums/loglevel.avsc

Logging levels.
MatchType schemas/enums/matchtype.avsc

Search match types.
MediaType schemas/enums/mediatype.avsc

MIME media types.
Month schemas/enums/month.avsc

Months of the year.
NetworkZone schemas/enums/networkzone.avsc

Network security zones.
NotificationChannel schemas/enums/notificationchannel.avsc

Notification channels.
PaymentMethod schemas/enums/paymentmethod.avsc

Payment methods.
Priority schemas/enums/priority.avsc

Priority levels.
Protocol schemas/enums/protocol.avsc

Network protocols.
RenamedEnum schemas/enums/renamedenum.avsc

An enum that was renamed.
ShippingMethod schemas/enums/shippingmethod.avsc

Shipping methods.
Singleton schemas/enums/singleton.avsc

An enum with a single symbol.
SortOrder schemas/enums/sortorder.avsc

Avro sort orders.
SpecSuit schemas/enums/specsuit.avsc

Exact example from Avro spec §Enums.
Status schemas/enums/status.avsc

Workflow status.
StorageClass schemas/enums/storageclass.avsc

Storage classes.
TLSVersion schemas/enums/tlsversion.avsc

TLS versions.
TransactionState schemas/enums/transactionstate.avsc

Transaction states.
Visibility schemas/enums/visibility.avsc

Visibility levels.
AESKey128 schemas/fixed/aeskey128.avsc

AES-128 key.
AESKey192 schemas/fixed/aeskey192.avsc

AES-192 key.
AESKey256 schemas/fixed/aeskey256.avsc

AES-256 key.
CRC32Checksum schemas/fixed/crc32checksum.avsc

CRC-32 checksum.
CRC64Checksum schemas/fixed/crc64checksum.avsc

CRC-64 checksum.
DurationFixed schemas/fixed/durationfixed.avsc

Duration: 3 little-endian uint32s (months, days, ms). Spec §Duration logical type.
ECPrivateKey schemas/fixed/ecprivatekey.avsc

EC private key (32 bytes).
ECPublicKey schemas/fixed/ecpublickey.avsc

EC public key (64 bytes, uncompressed).
APIKey32 schemas/fixed/extra_apikey32.avsc

API key (32 bytes).
BitcoinKey schemas/fixed/extra_bitcoinkey.avsc

Compressed Bitcoin public key (33 bytes).
Blake2b32 schemas/fixed/extra_blake2b32.avsc

BLAKE2b-256 digest.
CellId8 schemas/fixed/extra_cellid8.avsc

S2 CellId (64-bit = 8 bytes).
CompositeKey32 schemas/fixed/extra_compositekey32.avsc

Composite key (32 bytes).
CSRFToken32 schemas/fixed/extra_csrftoken32.avsc

CSRF token (32 bytes).
EtherAddress schemas/fixed/extra_etheraddress.avsc

Ethereum address (20 bytes).
Fingerprint32 schemas/fixed/extra_fingerprint32.avsc

256-bit fingerprint.
ForeignKey16 schemas/fixed/extra_foreignkey16.avsc

Opaque 16-byte foreign key.
GCMTag16 schemas/fixed/extra_gcmtag16.avsc

GCM authentication tag (16 bytes).
GeoHash8 schemas/fixed/extra_geohash8.avsc

GeoHash encoded as 8-byte fixed.
GridFSChunk schemas/fixed/extra_gridfschunk.avsc

GridFS chunk identifier (255 bytes).
IBAN schemas/fixed/extra_iban.avsc

IBAN bank account number (max 34 chars).
IBAN16 schemas/fixed/extra_iban16.avsc

Short IBAN variant (16 bytes).
IV16 schemas/fixed/extra_iv16.avsc

AES initialisation vector (16 bytes).
NanoId21 schemas/fixed/extra_nanoid21.avsc

NanoID (21 bytes).
ObjectId schemas/fixed/extra_objectid.avsc

MongoDB-style ObjectId (12 bytes).
PartitionKey16 schemas/fixed/extra_partitionkey16.avsc

Partition key (16 bytes).
PrimaryKey16 schemas/fixed/extra_primarykey16.avsc

Opaque 16-byte primary key.
RequestId16 schemas/fixed/extra_requestid16.avsc

HTTP request correlation ID (16 bytes).
RowVersion schemas/fixed/extra_rowversion.avsc

SQL Server rowversion / timestamp (8 bytes).
Salt16 schemas/fixed/extra_salt16.avsc

Cryptographic salt (16 bytes).
SessionToken32 schemas/fixed/extra_sessiontoken32.avsc

Session token (32 bytes).
SnowflakeId8 schemas/fixed/extra_snowflakeid8.avsc

Snowflake-style 64-bit ID (8 bytes).
SortKey8 schemas/fixed/extra_sortkey8.avsc

Sort key (8 bytes).
SpanId8 schemas/fixed/extra_spanid8.avsc

OpenTelemetry SpanId (64-bit = 8 bytes).
SWIFT schemas/fixed/extra_swift.avsc

SWIFT/BIC code (11 bytes).
TraceId16 schemas/fixed/extra_traceid16.avsc

OpenTelemetry TraceId (128-bit = 16 bytes).
ULID10 schemas/fixed/extra_ulid10.avsc

ULID compact representation (10 bytes).
XID12 schemas/fixed/extra_xid12.avsc

XID (12-byte globally unique ID).
HMACKey schemas/fixed/hmackey.avsc

HMAC key (32 bytes).
IPv4Address schemas/fixed/ipv4address.avsc

IPv4 address (4 bytes).
IPv6Address schemas/fixed/ipv6address.avsc

IPv6 address (16 bytes).
LargeFixed128 schemas/fixed/largefixed128.avsc

Large fixed: 128 bytes.
LargeFixed256 schemas/fixed/largefixed256.avsc

Large fixed: 256 bytes.
MacAddress schemas/fixed/macaddress.avsc

MAC address (6 bytes).
MagicBytes schemas/fixed/magicbytes.avsc

Avro container file magic bytes (4 bytes).
MD5Hash schemas/fixed/md5hash.avsc

MD5 hash (16 bytes).
Nonce32 schemas/fixed/nonce32.avsc

Cryptographic nonce (32 bytes).
RenamedFixed schemas/fixed/renamedfixed.avsc

A fixed with an alias for schema evolution.
RSAFingerprint schemas/fixed/rsafingerprint.avsc

RSA key fingerprint (20 bytes).
SHA1Hash schemas/fixed/sha1hash.avsc

SHA-1 hash (20 bytes).
SHA256Hash schemas/fixed/sha256hash.avsc

SHA-256 hash (32 bytes).
SHA512Hash schemas/fixed/sha512hash.avsc

SHA-512 hash (64 bytes).
SmallFixed1 schemas/fixed/smallfixed1.avsc

Minimal fixed: 1 byte.
SmallFixed2 schemas/fixed/smallfixed2.avsc

Small fixed: 2 bytes.
SmallFixed3 schemas/fixed/smallfixed3.avsc

Small fixed: 3 bytes.
SpecMD5 schemas/fixed/specmd5.avsc

Exact example from Avro spec §Fixed: {"type":"fixed","size":16,"name":"md5"}
SyncMarker schemas/fixed/syncmarker.avsc

Avro container file sync marker (16 bytes).
Timestamp8 schemas/fixed/timestamp8.avsc

Timestamp as 8-byte fixed.
UUIDBytes schemas/fixed/uuidbytes.avsc

UUID as 16-byte fixed (RFC-4122).
DateList schemas/logical-types/array_of_dates.avsc

Array of date logical type values.
bytes schemas/logical-types/big_decimal_bytes.avsc

Scalable precision decimal (big-decimal) on bytes. Avro 1.12.1 §Logical Types. Supported in C++, Java, Rust.
int schemas/logical-types/date_int.avsc

Date as days since unix epoch (1970-01-01). Avro spec §Date.
bytes schemas/logical-types/decimal_bytes_p10_s2.avsc

Monetary amount: decimal(10,2) on bytes.
bytes schemas/logical-types/decimal_bytes_p18_s6.avsc

High precision decimal(18,6) on bytes.
bytes schemas/logical-types/decimal_bytes_p38_s10.avsc

Maximum precision decimal(38,10) on bytes.
bytes schemas/logical-types/decimal_bytes_p4_s2.avsc

Spec example: decimal(4,2) on bytes.
bytes schemas/logical-types/decimal_bytes_p5_s0.avsc

Integer-like decimal(5,0) — scale 0.
bytes schemas/logical-types/decimal_bytes_p8_s8.avsc

Pure fractional decimal(8,8) — scale equals precision.
DecimalFixed_p18_s6 schemas/logical-types/decimal_fixed_p18_s6.avsc

decimal(18,6) on fixed(8).
DecimalFixed_p28_s10 schemas/logical-types/decimal_fixed_p28_s10.avsc

decimal(28,10) on fixed(12).
DecimalFixed_p4_s2 schemas/logical-types/decimal_fixed_p4_s2.avsc

decimal(4,2) on fixed(3): max 3 bytes = floor(log10(2^(8*3-1)-1)) = 6 digits.
DecimalFixed_p9_s4 schemas/logical-types/decimal_fixed_p9_s4.avsc

decimal(9,4) on fixed(4).
Avroduration schemas/logical-types/duration_fixed.avsc

Duration: fixed(12) with 3 unsigned little-endian 32-bit ints (months, days, milliseconds). Avro spec §Duration.
TemporalEvent schemas/logical-types/event_with_temporal_fields.avsc

An event record demonstrating all temporal logical types together.
long schemas/logical-types/local_timestamp_micros.avsc

Local timestamp in microseconds (no timezone). Avro spec §Local Timestamps.
long schemas/logical-types/local_timestamp_millis.avsc

Local timestamp in milliseconds (no timezone). Avro spec §Local Timestamps.
long schemas/logical-types/local_timestamp_nanos.avsc

Local timestamp in nanoseconds (no timezone). Added in Avro 1.12.0. Avro spec §Local Timestamps.
TimestampMap schemas/logical-types/map_of_timestamps.avsc

Map of timestamp-millis logical type values.
AllLogicalTypes schemas/logical-types/record_all_logical_types.avsc

Record with a field for every Avro 1.12.1 logical type.
NullableLogicalTypes schemas/logical-types/record_nullable_logical_types.avsc

Record with all logical types as nullable fields.
RecordWithCreatedAt schemas/logical-types/record_with_createdat.avsc

Record demonstrating a timestamp-millis logical type field.
RecordWithCreatedDate schemas/logical-types/record_with_createddate.avsc

Record demonstrating a date logical type field.
RecordWithDeletedAt schemas/logical-types/record_with_deletedat.avsc

Record demonstrating a timestamp-millis logical type field.
RecordWithDiscountAmount schemas/logical-types/record_with_discountamount.avsc

Record demonstrating a decimal logical type field.
RecordWithEndTime schemas/logical-types/record_with_endtime.avsc

Record demonstrating a time-millis logical type field.
RecordWithExpiryDate schemas/logical-types/record_with_expirydate.avsc

Record demonstrating a date logical type field.
RecordWithLocalCreatedAt schemas/logical-types/record_with_localcreatedat.avsc

Record demonstrating a local-timestamp-millis logical type field.
RecordWithLocalProcessedAt schemas/logical-types/record_with_localprocessedat.avsc

Record demonstrating a local-timestamp-nanos logical type field.
RecordWithLocalUpdatedAt schemas/logical-types/record_with_localupdatedat.avsc

Record demonstrating a local-timestamp-micros logical type field.
RecordWithPreciseEndTime schemas/logical-types/record_with_preciseendtime.avsc

Record demonstrating a time-micros logical type field.
RecordWithPreciseStartTime schemas/logical-types/record_with_precisestarttime.avsc

Record demonstrating a time-micros logical type field.
RecordWithPrice schemas/logical-types/record_with_price.avsc

Record demonstrating a decimal logical type field.
RecordWithProcessedAt schemas/logical-types/record_with_processedat.avsc

Record demonstrating a timestamp-micros logical type field.
RecordWithPublishedAt schemas/logical-types/record_with_publishedat.avsc

Record demonstrating a timestamp-micros logical type field.
RecordWithReceivedAt schemas/logical-types/record_with_receivedat.avsc

Record demonstrating a timestamp-nanos logical type field.
RecordWithSentAt schemas/logical-types/record_with_sentat.avsc

Record demonstrating a timestamp-nanos logical type field.
RecordWithStartTime schemas/logical-types/record_with_starttime.avsc

Record demonstrating a time-millis logical type field.
RecordWithTaxAmount schemas/logical-types/record_with_taxamount.avsc

Record demonstrating a decimal logical type field.
RecordWithUpdatedAt schemas/logical-types/record_with_updatedat.avsc

Record demonstrating a timestamp-millis logical type field.
RecordWithUpdatedDate schemas/logical-types/record_with_updateddate.avsc

Record demonstrating a date logical type field.
long schemas/logical-types/time_micros.avsc

Time of day in microseconds after midnight. Avro spec §Time (microsecond precision).
int schemas/logical-types/time_millis.avsc

Time of day in milliseconds after midnight. Avro spec §Time (millisecond precision).
long schemas/logical-types/timestamp_micros.avsc

Instant as microseconds from unix epoch. Avro spec §Timestamps.
long schemas/logical-types/timestamp_millis.avsc

Instant as milliseconds from unix epoch. Avro spec §Timestamps.
long schemas/logical-types/timestamp_nanos.avsc

Instant as nanoseconds from unix epoch. Added in Avro 1.12.0. Avro spec §Timestamps.
UUIDFixed schemas/logical-types/uuid_fixed.avsc

UUID as 16-byte fixed (RFC-4122). Avro spec §UUID.
string schemas/logical-types/uuid_string.avsc

UUID v4 as string (RFC-4122). Avro spec §UUID.

map<double> schemas/maps/extra_map_of_double.avsc
map<float> schemas/maps/extra_map_of_float.avsc

map<long> schemas/maps/map_of_long.avsc

AttributeMap schemas/maps/record_map_attributemap.avsc

Record with a map of string values.
ConfigMap schemas/maps/record_map_configmap.avsc

Record with a map of string values.
CounterMap schemas/maps/record_map_countermap.avsc

Record with a map of long values.
FlagMap schemas/maps/record_map_flagmap.avsc

Record with a map of boolean values.
IndexMap schemas/maps/record_map_indexmap.avsc

Record with a map of int values.
LabelSet schemas/maps/record_map_labelset.avsc

Record with a map of string values.
MetadataMap schemas/maps/record_map_metadatamap.avsc

Record with a map of bytes values.
PropertyMap schemas/maps/record_map_propertymap.avsc

Record with a map of string values.
ScoreMap schemas/maps/record_map_scoremap.avsc

Record with a map of double values.
WeightMap schemas/maps/record_map_weightmap.avsc

Record with a map of float values.
RecordWithMaps schemas/maps/record_with_map_fields.avsc

Record demonstrating map fields with defaults.
map<map<map<string>>> schemas/maps/triple_nested_map.avsc
StringRecord schemas/names/all_primitive_type_names_as_record_names.avsc

Uses "string" as a simple name but inside a namespace — legal per spec.
com.example.names.DottedFullname schemas/names/dotted_fullname_record.avsc

Fullname comes from the dotted name attribute; namespace attr is ignored.
EmptyNamespaceRecord schemas/names/empty_namespace_record.avsc

Empty string namespace = null namespace. Spec: "The empty string may also be used as a namespace to indicate the null namespace."
DeepRecord schemas/names/long_namespace.avsc

Record with a very deeply nested namespace.
AlphaRecord schemas/names/multins_alpharecord.avsc

Fullname: com.example.a.AlphaRecord
BetaRecord schemas/names/multins_betarecord.avsc

Fullname: com.example.a.b.BetaRecord
DeltaRecord schemas/names/multins_deltarecord.avsc

Fullname: com.example.a.b.c.d.DeltaRecord
EpsilonRecord schemas/names/multins_epsilonrecord.avsc

Fullname: org.apache.avro.test.EpsilonRecord
EtaRecord schemas/names/multins_etarecord.avsc

Fullname: net.example.eta.EtaRecord
GammaRecord schemas/names/multins_gammarecord.avsc

Fullname: com.example.a.b.c.GammaRecord
ThetaRecord schemas/names/multins_thetarecord.avsc

Fullname: com.acme.core.schema.ThetaRecord
ZetaRecord schemas/names/multins_zetarecord.avsc

Fullname: io.example.zeta.ZetaRecord
NullNamespaceEnum schemas/names/null_namespace_enum.avsc

Enum with null namespace — fullname is just "NullNamespaceEnum".
NullNamespaceFixed schemas/names/null_namespace_fixed.avsc

Fixed with null namespace — fullname is just "NullNamespaceFixed".
NullNamespaceRecord schemas/names/null_namespace_record.avsc

Record with null namespace — fullname is just "NullNamespaceRecord".
Container schemas/names/same_name_different_namespace.avsc

Shows same simple name used in two different namespaces — legal in Avro.
X schemas/names/single_char_name.avsc

Minimal valid name: single character.
Example schemas/names/spec_namespace_example.avsc

Reproduces the spec §Names namespace inheritance example.
_ schemas/names/underscore_only_name.avsc

Single underscore is a valid name per spec: starts with [A-Za-z_].
ValidName_ALLCAPS schemas/names/valid_name_ALLCAPS.avsc

Valid record name: ALLCAPS
ValidName_CamelCase schemas/names/valid_name_CamelCase.avsc

Valid record name: CamelCase
ValidName_PascalCase schemas/names/valid_name_PascalCase.avsc

Valid record name: PascalCase
ValidName_UpperCase schemas/names/valid_name_UpperCase.avsc

Valid record name: UpperCase
ValidName_Z schemas/names/valid_name_Z.avsc

Valid record name: Z
ValidName__ schemas/names/valid_name__.avsc

Valid record name: _
ValidName__underscoreStart schemas/names/valid_name__underscoreStart.avsc

Valid record name: _underscoreStart
ValidName_a schemas/names/valid_name_a.avsc

Valid record name: a
ValidName_lowerCase schemas/names/valid_name_lowerCase.avsc

Valid record name: lowerCase
ValidName_mixed123Numbers schemas/names/valid_name_mixed123Numbers.avsc

Valid record name: mixed123Numbers
ValidName_number1 schemas/names/valid_name_number1.avsc

Valid record name: number1
ValidName_with_underscores schemas/names/valid_name_with_underscores.avsc

Valid record name: with_underscores

PrimitiveOrderDescending schemas/primitives/primitive_order_descending.avsc

PrimitiveOrderIgnore schemas/primitives/primitive_order_ignore.avsc

Tests every field default type from the spec table.

Top level of a 5-level nested record structure.

LargeRecord01 schemas/records/large_record_01.avsc

A large record with 50 fields (variant 1).
LargeRecord02 schemas/records/large_record_02.avsc

A large record with 50 fields (variant 2).

A large record with 50 fields (variant 3).
LargeRecord04 schemas/records/large_record_04.avsc

LargeRecord05 schemas/records/large_record_05.avsc

MinimalRecord schemas/records/minimal_record.avsc

A minimal record with no fields. Useful as a placeholder or marker type in schemas where the presence of the record itself carries meaning.
AuditLog schemas/records/misc_auditlog.avsc

AuditLog record.
BatchRecord schemas/records/misc_batchrecord.avsc

A person with a nested address.
Address schemas/records/nested_records.avsc

A postal address.

A record that has been renamed; old names are kept as aliases.

A linked list of 64-bit values. Directly from the Avro spec.
BinaryTreeNode schemas/records/self_referential_tree.avsc

A binary tree node.

Demonstrates referencing named types defined in other files in the same --input folder.

NewEnumName

Enum renamed; old name as alias.

P, Q, R

Annotations

Annotation Value
default P

com.example.aliases

FieldAliasRecord

Record where fields have aliases for schema evolution.

Fields

TypeFieldDefault ValueDescriptionAnnotations
string userId ""
  • aliases: 
    [
   "user_id",
   "uid",
   "id"
]
string firstName ""
  • aliases: 
    [
   "first_name",
   "given_name"
]
string lastName ""
  • aliases: 
    [
   "last_name",
   "family_name"
]
string emailAddr ""
  • aliases: 
    [
   "email",
   "emailAddress",
   "e"
]
null | string phoneNum null
  • aliases: 
    [
   "phone",
   "phoneNumber"
]

CanonicalRecord

com.example.aliases

CurrentRecord

TypeFieldDefault ValueDescriptionAnnotations

com.example.aliases

NewRecordName

Record renamed; old name kept as alias for schema evolution.

Fields

TypeFieldDefault ValueDescriptionAnnotations
string id ""
bytes data ""

com.example.aliases

EvolvingSchema

Demonstrates schema evolution: renamed field (alias), added field (default), changed namespace via record alias.

Fields

TypeFieldDefault ValueDescriptionAnnotations
string newName ""

Renamed from oldName to newName.
  • aliases: 
    [
   "oldName"
]
int addedField 0

New field with default for backward compatibility.
boolean kept false

Unchanged field.

com.example.complex.misc

ComplexMisc01

TypeFieldDefault ValueDescriptionAnnotations
string id
  • logicalType: uuid
int version 1
string name ""
null | string optionalMsg null
map<string> metadata {}
array<string> tags []
long createdAt
  • logicalType: timestamp-millis

TypeFieldDefault ValueDescriptionAnnotations
string exportId
  • logicalType: uuid
string format "AVRO"
long rowCount 0
long sizeBytes 0
null | bytes checksum null
long exportedAt
  • logicalType: timestamp-micros

com.example.events

InventoryUpdatedEvent

Kafka-style event: InventoryUpdatedEvent.

Fields

TypeFieldDefault ValueDescriptionAnnotations
string productId
  • logicalType: uuid
int delta 0
string reason ""
long updatedAt
  • logicalType: timestamp-millis

OrderPlacedEvent

Fields

TypeFieldDefault ValueDescriptionAnnotations
string orderId
  • logicalType: uuid
string userId
  • logicalType: uuid
bytes total
  • logicalType: decimal
string currency "USD"
long placedAt
  • logicalType: timestamp-millis

PaymentProcessedEvent

Fields

TypeFieldDefault ValueDescriptionAnnotations
string paymentId
  • logicalType: uuid
string orderId
  • logicalType: uuid
string status ""
bytes amount
  • logicalType: decimal
long processedAt
  • logicalType: timestamp-millis

ReportGeneratedEvent

Fields

TypeFieldDefault ValueDescriptionAnnotations
string reportId
  • logicalType: uuid
string type ""

  • logicalType: date

  • logicalType: date

ReportDuration

com.example.complex

KitchenSink

One record containing every Avro complex type and a mix of logical types.

Fields

TypeFieldDefault ValueDescriptionAnnotations
string str ""
long num 0
boolean flag false
double ratio 0
bytes raw ""
KSStatus status "OPEN"
KSHash hash
array<string> tags []
map<string> attrs {}
null | string optVal null
int date
  • logicalType: date
long ts
  • logicalType: timestamp-millis
bytes price
  • logicalType: decimal
string uuid
  • logicalType: uuid

com.example.complex

KSStatus

Enum symbols:

OPEN, CLOSED

Annotations

Annotation Value
default OPEN

com.example.complex

KSHash

Fixed-length byte string (16 bytes)

com.example.complex.union8

TypeA

String-valued variant of an eight-type union. Used when the payload is human-readable text.

Fields

TypeFieldDefault ValueDescriptionAnnotations
string v ""

The string payload.

com.example.complex.union8

TypeB

Integer-valued variant of an eight-type union. Suitable for small whole-number payloads.

Fields

TypeFieldDefault ValueDescriptionAnnotations
int v 0

32-bit integer payload.

com.example.complex.union8

TypeC

Long-valued variant of an eight-type union. Use when the integer range exceeds 32 bits.

Fields

TypeFieldDefault ValueDescriptionAnnotations
long v 0

64-bit long payload.

com.example.complex.union8

TypeD

Double-valued variant of an eight-type union. Used for floating-point numeric payloads.

Fields

TypeFieldDefault ValueDescriptionAnnotations
double v 0

64-bit floating-point payload.

com.example.complex.union8

TypeE

Enum variant of an eight-type union. Represents one of three abstract categories.

Enum symbols:

E1, E2, E3

Annotations

Annotation Value
default E1

com.example.complex.union8

TypeF

Fixed 4-byte variant of an eight-type union. Useful for compact binary identifiers.

Fixed-length byte string (4 bytes)

com.example.complex.union8

TypeG

Boolean-valued variant of an eight-type union. Used for simple true/false payloads.

Fields

TypeFieldDefault ValueDescriptionAnnotations
boolean v false

Boolean flag payload.

com.example.complex.union8

TypeH

Bytes-valued variant of an eight-type union. Used for opaque binary payloads.

Fields

TypeFieldDefault ValueDescriptionAnnotations
bytes v ""

Raw binary payload.

com.example.complex

TypedRegistry

A map from string keys to heterogeneous records (union values).

Fields

TypeFieldDefault ValueDescriptionAnnotations
string name ""
int version 1
map<null | RegistryEntryA | RegistryEntryB> entries {}

com.example.complex

RegistryEntryA

Fields

TypeFieldDefault ValueDescriptionAnnotations
string data ""

com.example.complex

RegistryEntryB

Fields

TypeFieldDefault ValueDescriptionAnnotations
long value 0

com.example.complex

Parent

Parent record with an inline child definition.

Fields

TypeFieldDefault ValueDescriptionAnnotations
string id ""
string name ""
array<Child> children []

com.example.complex

Child

Child record nested inside Parent.

Fields

TypeFieldDefault ValueDescriptionAnnotations
string id ""
string name ""
string parentId ""

PolymorphicEvent

An event that can be one of several event types (polymorphism via union).

TypeFieldDefault ValueDescriptionAnnotations
string eventId ""
long timestamp 0
null | ClickEvent | PageViewEvent | PurchaseEvent | ErrorEvent payload null

ProtocolError

TypeFieldDefault ValueDescriptionAnnotations
int code 0
string message ""
map<string> details {}
null | string cause null

SHA-1 hash (20 bytes).

Fixed-length byte string (20 bytes)

com.example.fixed

SHA256Hash

SHA-256 hash (32 bytes).

Fixed-length byte string (32 bytes)

com.example.fixed

SHA512Hash

SHA-512 hash (64 bytes).

Fixed-length byte string (64 bytes)

com.example.fixed

SmallFixed1

Minimal fixed: 1 byte.

Fixed-length byte string (1 bytes)

com.example.fixed

SmallFixed2

Small fixed: 2 bytes.

Fixed-length byte string (2 bytes)

com.example.fixed

SmallFixed3

Small fixed: 3 bytes.

Fixed-length byte string (3 bytes)

com.example.spec

SpecMD5

Exact example from Avro spec §Fixed: {"type":"fixed","size":16,"name":"md5"}

Fixed-length byte string (16 bytes)

com.example.fixed

SyncMarker

Avro container file sync marker (16 bytes).

Fixed-length byte string (16 bytes)

com.example.fixed

Timestamp8

Timestamp as 8-byte fixed.

Fixed-length byte string (8 bytes)

com.example.fixed

UUIDBytes

UUID as 16-byte fixed (RFC-4122).

Fixed-length byte string (16 bytes)

com.example.logical

DateList

Array of date logical type values.

Fields

TypeFieldDefault ValueDescriptionAnnotations
array<int> dates []

com.example.logical

DecimalFixed_p18_s6

decimal(18,6) on fixed(8).

Fixed-length byte string (8 bytes)

com.example.logical

DecimalFixed_p28_s10

decimal(28,10) on fixed(12).

Fixed-length byte string (12 bytes)

com.example.logical

DecimalFixed_p4_s2

decimal(4,2) on fixed(3): max 3 bytes = floor(log10(2^(8*3-1)-1)) = 6 digits.

Fixed-length byte string (3 bytes)

com.example.logical

DecimalFixed_p9_s4

decimal(9,4) on fixed(4).

Fixed-length byte string (4 bytes)

com.example.logical

Avroduration

Duration: fixed(12) with 3 unsigned little-endian 32-bit ints (months, days, milliseconds). Avro spec §Duration.

Fixed-length byte string (12 bytes)

com.example.logical

TemporalEvent

An event record demonstrating all temporal logical types together.

Fields

TypeFieldDefault ValueDescriptionAnnotations
string eventId

UUID v4 event identifier.
  • logicalType: uuid
long occurredAt

When the event occurred (UTC).
  • logicalType: timestamp-millis
long occurredAtUs

When the event occurred (UTC, microseconds).
  • logicalType: timestamp-micros
long occurredAtNs

When the event occurred (UTC, nanoseconds, Avro 1.12+).
  • logicalType: timestamp-nanos
long localOccurred

Local occurrence time (no timezone).
  • logicalType: local-timestamp-millis
int eventDate

Date of the event.
  • logicalType: date
int eventTime

Time of day of the event.
  • logicalType: time-millis
long eventTimeMicro

Time of day (microseconds).
  • logicalType: time-micros
EventDuration retentionPeriod

How long to retain this event.
  • logicalType: duration
bytes amount

Monetary amount.
  • logicalType: decimal

com.example.logical

EventDuration

Fixed-length byte string (12 bytes)

com.example.logical

TimestampMap

Map of timestamp-millis logical type values.

Fields

TypeFieldDefault ValueDescriptionAnnotations
map<long> timestamps {}

com.example.logical

AllLogicalTypes

Record with a field for every Avro 1.12.1 logical type.

Fields

TypeFieldDefault ValueDescriptionAnnotations
bytes decimalBytes

decimal on bytes
  • logicalType: decimal
AllLogDecFixed decimalFixed

decimal on fixed
  • logicalType: decimal
bytes bigDecimal

big-decimal on bytes
  • logicalType: big-decimal
string uuidStr

uuid on string
  • logicalType: uuid
AllLogUUIDFixed uuidFixed

uuid on fixed(16)
  • logicalType: uuid
int date

date
  • logicalType: date
int timeMillis

time-millis
  • logicalType: time-millis
long timeMicros

time-micros
  • logicalType: time-micros
long tsMillis

timestamp-millis
  • logicalType: timestamp-millis
long tsMicros

timestamp-micros
  • logicalType: timestamp-micros
long tsNanos

timestamp-nanos (Avro 1.12+)
  • logicalType: timestamp-nanos
long localTsMillis

local-timestamp-millis
  • logicalType: local-timestamp-millis
long localTsMicros

local-timestamp-micros
  • logicalType: local-timestamp-micros
long localTsNanos

local-timestamp-nanos (Avro 1.12+)
  • logicalType: local-timestamp-nanos
AllLogDuration duration

duration on fixed(12)
  • logicalType: duration

com.example.logical

AllLogDecFixed

Fixed-length byte string (4 bytes)

com.example.logical

AllLogUUIDFixed

Fixed-length byte string (16 bytes)

com.example.logical

AllLogDuration

Fixed-length byte string (12 bytes)

com.example.maps

MapStatus

Binary status flag used as the value type in a feature-flag map. ON indicates the feature is active.

Enum symbols:

ON, OFF

Annotations

Annotation Value
default OFF

com.example.maps

MapFixed16

Fixed-length byte string (16 bytes)

com.example.maps

MapValueRecord

A record used as the value type in a string-keyed map, pairing an identifier with a score.

Fields

TypeFieldDefault ValueDescriptionAnnotations
string id ""

Unique identifier for this entry.
double score 0

Computed score for this entry, between 0.0 and 1.0.

com.example.names.primitivenames

StringRecord

Uses "string" as a simple name but inside a namespace — legal per spec.

Fields

TypeFieldDefault ValueDescriptionAnnotations
string v ""

ignored.namespace

com.example.names.DottedFullname

Fullname comes from the dotted name attribute; namespace attr is ignored.

Fields

TypeFieldDefault ValueDescriptionAnnotations
int x 0

EmptyNamespaceRecord

Empty string namespace = null namespace. Spec: "The empty string may also be used as a namespace to indicate the null namespace."

Fields

TypeFieldDefault ValueDescriptionAnnotations
string y ""

com.example.a.b.c.d.e.f.g

DeepRecord

Record with a very deeply nested namespace.

TypeFieldDefault ValueDescriptionAnnotations
string v ""

A, B

com.example.names

Container

Shows same simple name used in two different namespaces — legal in Avro.

Fields

TypeFieldDefault ValueDescriptionAnnotations
Item ns1Value
Item ns2Value

com.example.names.ns1

Item

Fields

TypeFieldDefault ValueDescriptionAnnotations
int x 0

com.example.names.ns2

Item

Fields

TypeFieldDefault ValueDescriptionAnnotations
string y ""

com.example.names.single

X

Minimal valid name: single character.

Fields

TypeFieldDefault ValueDescriptionAnnotations
int v 0

Example

Reproduces the spec §Names namespace inheritance example.

Fields

TypeFieldDefault ValueDescriptionAnnotations
Simple inheritNull "a"
Simple explicitNamespace
a.full.Name fullName

Simple

Inherits null namespace from Example. Fullname: Simple.

Enum symbols:

a, b

explicit

Simple

Explicit namespace. Fullname: explicit.Simple (different from above).

Fixed-length byte string (12 bytes)

ignored

a.full.Name

Dotted fullname; namespace ignored. Fullname: a.full.Name.

Fields

TypeFieldDefault ValueDescriptionAnnotations
Understanding inheritNamespace "d"

ignored

Understanding

Inherits a.full namespace. Fullname: a.full.Understanding.

Enum symbols:

d, e

com.example.names.underscore

_

Single underscore is a valid name per spec: starts with [A-Za-z_].

Fields

TypeFieldDefault ValueDescriptionAnnotations
int v 0

com.example.records

AllFieldDefaults

Tests every field default type from the spec table.

Fields

TypeFieldDefault ValueDescriptionAnnotations
null nullField null
boolean boolField true
int intField 42
long longField 9999999
float floatField 1.5
double doubleField 3.14
bytes bytesField "ÿ"
string stringField "hello"
DefaultColor enumField "RED"
array<int> arrayField []
map<string> mapField {}
DefaultFixed4 fixedField "\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000"
InnerRecord recordField { "x": 1 }
null | string unionField null

com.example.records

FullFieldAttributes

Record demonstrating every field attribute from the spec.

Fields

TypeFieldDefault ValueDescriptionAnnotations
int ascendingInt ascending 0

An int field with ascending sort order.
  • order: ascending
long descendingLong descending 0

A long field with descending sort order.
  • order: descending
string ignoredString ignore ""

A string field ignored in sort order.
  • aliases: 
    [
   "oldIgnoredString",
   "legacyIgnored"
]
  • order: ignore

com.example.records

MinimalRecord

A minimal record with no fields. Useful as a placeholder or marker type in schemas where the presence of the record itself carries meaning.

This record has no fields.

AuditLog

TypeFieldDefault ValueDescriptionAnnotations
string actor ""
string action ""
string resource ""

long ts 0
null | string details null

com.example.ns

OuterRecord

Demonstrates namespace inheritance for nested named types.

Fields

TypeFieldDefault ValueDescriptionAnnotations
Status innerEnum "ACTIVE"
Hash explicitNsFixed
a.b.InnerRecord fullNameRecord

com.example.ns

Status

Status enum inheriting namespace from OuterRecord.

Enum symbols:

ACTIVE, INACTIVE, PENDING

com.example.hashing

Hash

Fixed-length byte string (32 bytes)

ignored

a.b.InnerRecord

Uses a dotted fullname; the namespace attribute is ignored.

Fields

TypeFieldDefault ValueDescriptionAnnotations
InheritedStatus inheritedEnum "YES"

ignored

InheritedStatus

Enum symbols:

YES, NO

com.example.records

Person

A person with a nested address.

Fields

TypeFieldDefault ValueDescriptionAnnotations

string lastName ""
int age 0
HomeAddress homeAddress
null | WorkAddress workAddress null

LongList

A linked list of 64-bit values. Directly from the Avro spec.

TypeFieldDefault ValueDescriptionAnnotations

null | LongList next null

The next node, or null.

com.example.unions

RecordWithUnions

Record with various union field types.

Fields

TypeFieldDefault ValueDescriptionAnnotations
null | string optString null
null | int optInt null
null | long optLong null
null | double optDouble null
null | boolean optBoolean null
null | bytes optBytes null
null | string | int | boolean multiType null

com.example.pets

Cat

Represents a domestic cat. One of three pet variants in this union.

Fields

TypeFieldDefault ValueDescriptionAnnotations
string breed ""

Recognised cat breed name, e.g. 'Siamese' or 'Maine Coon'.

com.example.pets

Dog

Represents a domestic dog. One of three pet variants in this union.

Fields

TypeFieldDefault ValueDescriptionAnnotations
string breed ""

Recognised dog breed name, e.g. 'Labrador' or 'Poodle'.

com.example.pets

Bird

Represents a pet bird. One of three pet variants in this union.

Fields

TypeFieldDefault ValueDescriptionAnnotations
string species ""

Bird species name, e.g. 'Budgerigar' or 'African Grey Parrot'.

com.example.unions

UnionRecord

Record variant of a mixed union, carrying an arbitrary binary payload.

Fields

TypeFieldDefault ValueDescriptionAnnotations
bytes data ""

Raw binary data for this union variant.

com.example.unions

UnionEnum

Enum variant of a mixed union. Symbols represent abstract categories X, Y, and Z.

Enum symbols:

X, Y, Z

Annotations

Annotation Value
default X

com.example.unions

UnionFixed

Fixed-size binary variant of a mixed union. Stores exactly 4 bytes, e.g. an IPv4 address.

Fixed-length byte string (4 bytes)

com.example.unions

UnionDefaultRecord

Demonstrates union field defaults matching first schema type.

Fields

TypeFieldDefault ValueDescriptionAnnotations
string | int stringOrInt "default_string_value"

Default matches first type (string).
null | string nullOrString null

Default matches first type (null).
int | null intOrNull 42

Default matches first type (int).

com.example.unions

UnionRecordA

First variant of a two-record union, carrying a string payload.

Fields

TypeFieldDefault ValueDescriptionAnnotations
string aField ""

String value for variant A.

com.example.unions

UnionRecordB

Second variant of a two-record union, carrying an integer payload.

Fields

TypeFieldDefault ValueDescriptionAnnotations
int bField 0

Integer value for variant B.

FieldAliasRecord

  • schemas/aliases/field_aliases.avsc

Record where fields have aliases for schema evolution.

TypeFieldDefault ValueDescriptionAnnotations
string userId ""
  • aliases: 
    [
   "user_id",
   "uid",
   "id"
]
string firstName ""
  • aliases: 
    [
   "first_name",
   "given_name"
]
string lastName ""
  • aliases: 
    [
   "last_name",
   "family_name"
]
string emailAddr ""
  • aliases: 
    [
   "email",
   "emailAddress",
   "e"
]
null | string phoneNum null
  • aliases: 
    [
   "phone",
   "phoneNumber"
]

com.example.aliases

EvolvingSchema

Defined in:

  • schemas/aliases/schema_evolution_v2.avsc

Demonstrates schema evolution: renamed field (alias), added field (default), changed namespace via record alias.

Fields

TypeFieldDefault ValueDescriptionAnnotations
string newName ""

Renamed from oldName to newName.
  • aliases: 
    [
   "oldName"
]
int addedField 0

New field with default for backward compatibility.
boolean kept false

Unchanged field.

TypeA

  • schemas/complex/large_union_eight_types.avsc

String-valued variant of an eight-type union. Used when the payload is human-readable text.

TypeFieldDefault ValueDescriptionAnnotations
string v ""

The string payload.

com.example.complex.union8

TypeB

Defined in:

  • schemas/complex/large_union_eight_types.avsc

Integer-valued variant of an eight-type union. Suitable for small whole-number payloads.

Fields

TypeFieldDefault ValueDescriptionAnnotations
int v 0

32-bit integer payload.

com.example.complex.union8

TypeC

Defined in:

  • schemas/complex/large_union_eight_types.avsc

Long-valued variant of an eight-type union. Use when the integer range exceeds 32 bits.

Fields

TypeFieldDefault ValueDescriptionAnnotations
long v 0

64-bit long payload.

com.example.complex.union8

TypeD

Defined in:

  • schemas/complex/large_union_eight_types.avsc

Double-valued variant of an eight-type union. Used for floating-point numeric payloads.

TypeFieldDefault ValueDescriptionAnnotations
double v 0

TypeE

Defined in:

  • schemas/complex/large_union_eight_types.avsc

E1, E2, E3

Annotation Value
default E1

com.example.complex.union8

TypeF

Defined in:

  • schemas/complex/large_union_eight_types.avsc

Fixed 4-byte variant of an eight-type union. Useful for compact binary identifiers.

TypeG

bytes v ""

  • schemas/enums/extra_timezonegroup.avsc

Annotation Value
default UTC

DecimalFixed_p18_s6

Defined in:

  • schemas/logical-types/decimal_fixed_p18_s6.avsc

decimal(18,6) on fixed(8).

DecimalFixed_p28_s10

Defined in:

  • schemas/logical-types/decimal_fixed_p28_s10.avsc

decimal(28,10) on fixed(12).

com.example.logical

DecimalFixed_p4_s2

Defined in:

  • schemas/logical-types/decimal_fixed_p4_s2.avsc

decimal(4,2) on fixed(3): max 3 bytes = floor(log10(2^(8*3-1)-1)) = 6 digits.

Fixed-length byte string (3 bytes)

com.example.logical

DecimalFixed_p9_s4

Defined in:

  • schemas/logical-types/decimal_fixed_p9_s4.avsc

decimal(9,4) on fixed(4).

Fixed-length byte string (4 bytes)

com.example.logical

Avroduration

Defined in:

  • schemas/logical-types/duration_fixed.avsc

Duration: fixed(12) with 3 unsigned little-endian 32-bit ints (months, days, milliseconds). Avro spec §Duration.

Fixed-length byte string (12 bytes)

com.example.logical

TemporalEvent

Defined in:

  • schemas/logical-types/event_with_temporal_fields.avsc

An event record demonstrating all temporal logical types together.

Fields

TypeFieldDefault ValueDescriptionAnnotations
string eventId

UUID v4 event identifier.
  • logicalType: uuid
long occurredAt

When the event occurred (UTC).
  • logicalType: timestamp-millis
long occurredAtUs

When the event occurred (UTC, microseconds).
  • logicalType: timestamp-micros
long occurredAtNs

When the event occurred (UTC, nanoseconds, Avro 1.12+).
  • logicalType: timestamp-nanos
long localOccurred

Local occurrence time (no timezone).
  • logicalType: local-timestamp-millis
int eventDate

Date of the event.
  • logicalType: date
int eventTime

Time of day of the event.
  • logicalType: time-millis
long eventTimeMicro

Time of day (microseconds).
  • logicalType: time-micros
EventDuration retentionPeriod

How long to retain this event.
  • logicalType: duration
bytes amount

Monetary amount.
  • logicalType: decimal

com.example.logical

EventDuration

Defined in:

  • schemas/logical-types/event_with_temporal_fields.avsc

Fixed-length byte string (12 bytes)

com.example.logical

TimestampMap

Defined in:

  • schemas/logical-types/map_of_timestamps.avsc

Map of timestamp-millis logical type values.

Fields

TypeFieldDefault ValueDescriptionAnnotations
map<long> timestamps {}

com.example.logical

AllLogicalTypes

Defined in:

  • schemas/logical-types/record_all_logical_types.avsc

Record with a field for every Avro 1.12.1 logical type.

Fields

TypeFieldDefault ValueDescriptionAnnotations
bytes decimalBytes

decimal on bytes
  • logicalType: decimal
AllLogDecFixed decimalFixed

decimal on fixed
  • logicalType: decimal
bytes bigDecimal

big-decimal on bytes
  • logicalType: big-decimal
string uuidStr

uuid on string
  • logicalType: uuid
AllLogUUIDFixed uuidFixed

uuid on fixed(16)
  • logicalType: uuid
int date

date
  • logicalType: date
int timeMillis

time-millis
  • logicalType: time-millis
long timeMicros

time-micros
  • logicalType: time-micros
long tsMillis

timestamp-millis
  • logicalType: timestamp-millis
long tsMicros

timestamp-micros
  • logicalType: timestamp-micros
long tsNanos

timestamp-nanos (Avro 1.12+)
  • logicalType: timestamp-nanos
long localTsMillis

local-timestamp-millis
  • logicalType: local-timestamp-millis
long localTsMicros

local-timestamp-micros
  • logicalType: local-timestamp-micros
long localTsNanos

local-timestamp-nanos (Avro 1.12+)
  • logicalType: local-timestamp-nanos
AllLogDuration duration

duration on fixed(12)
  • logicalType: duration

  • schemas/logical-types/record_all_logical_types.avsc

Fixed-length byte string (4 bytes)

a, b

explicit

Simple

ignored

a.full.Name

  • schemas/names/spec_namespace_example.avsc

Dotted fullname; namespace ignored. Fullname: a.full.Name.

TypeFieldDefault ValueDescriptionAnnotations
Understanding inheritNamespace "d"

ignored

d, e

AllFieldDefaults

Defined in:

  • schemas/records/all_field_defaults.avsc

Tests every field default type from the spec table.

Fields

TypeFieldDefault ValueDescriptionAnnotations
null nullField null
boolean boolField true
int intField 42
long longField 9999999
float floatField 1.5
double doubleField 3.14
bytes bytesField "ÿ"
string stringField "hello"
DefaultColor enumField "RED"
array<int> arrayField []
map<string> mapField {}
DefaultFixed4 fixedField "\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000"
InnerRecord recordField { "x": 1 }
null | string unionField null

null | string checksum null

com.example.records

FullFieldAttributes

Defined in:

  • schemas/records/full_field_attributes.avsc

Record demonstrating every field attribute from the spec.

Fields

TypeFieldDefault ValueDescriptionAnnotations
int ascendingInt ascending 0

An int field with ascending sort order.
  • order: ascending
long descendingLong descending 0

A long field with descending sort order.
  • order: descending
string ignoredString ignore ""

A string field ignored in sort order.
  • aliases: 
    [
   "oldIgnoredString",
   "legacyIgnored"
]
  • order: ignore

com.example.records

MinimalRecord

Defined in:

  • schemas/records/minimal_record.avsc

A minimal record with no fields. Useful as a placeholder or marker type in schemas where the presence of the record itself carries meaning.

This record has no fields.

long issuedAt 0
long expiresAt 0
array<string> scopes []

Cat

Defined in:

  • schemas/unions/union_multiple_records.avsc

Represents a domestic cat. One of three pet variants in this union.

Fields

TypeFieldDefault ValueDescriptionAnnotations
string breed ""

Recognised cat breed name, e.g. 'Siamese' or 'Maine Coon'.

com.example.pets

Dog

Defined in:

  • schemas/unions/union_multiple_records.avsc

Represents a domestic dog. One of three pet variants in this union.

TypeFieldDefault ValueDescriptionAnnotations
string breed ""

Recognised dog breed name, e.g. 'Labrador' or 'Poodle'.

Bird

Defined in:

  • schemas/unions/union_multiple_records.avsc

Represents a pet bird. One of three pet variants in this union.

TypeFieldDefault ValueDescriptionAnnotations

Bird species name, e.g. 'Budgerigar' or 'African Grey Parrot'.

Annotation Value
default X

com.example.unions

UnionFixed

Defined in:

  • schemas/unions/union_record_enum_fixed.avsc

Fixed-size binary variant of a mixed union. Stores exactly 4 bytes, e.g. an IPv4 address.

Fixed-length byte string (4 bytes)
